title: BEL Assistant Security Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: The Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has officially announced the Assistant Security Officer Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification was published on 13 May 2026 at bel-india.in . Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 40 years and hold a degree in any discipline (Pass Class) from a recognized university can now submit their online applications from 13 May 2026 to 02 June 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: OBC(NCL): 03 Years, SC/ST: 05 Years, Ex-Servicemen: additional 05 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in any discipline (Pass Class from a recognized University)
qualification.details: Degree in any discipline (Pass Class from a recognized University)

selection_process: Written Test (85 marks) Interview (15 marks) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BEL Assistant Security Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BEL to complete the application.
